problem.label: Why Wollny
problem.title: A misaligned chassis costs you on every kilometre.
problem.subtitle: Just a few millimetres of toe deviation mean faster wear, higher consumption and less grip. We bring every detail back to the point.

cloud.title: Without professional alignment
points: Higher fuel consumption from rolling resistance
Restless steering and pulling to one side
Longer braking distance when it matters

local.title: With professional alignment
points: Full grip and short braking distances

services.label: Services
services.title: Everything around tyres, rims and chassis.
services.subtitle: From tyre fitting through 3D wheel alignment to the purchase and sale of rims — one point of contact, one reliable result.

items.title: Tyre service & fitting
items.description: Fitting, balancing and seasonal changes for cars, SUVs and performance vehicles — gently on our Hunter Evolution machine and with controlled torque.

items.title: 3D wheel alignment with Hunter
items.description: Computer-aided 3D chassis alignment on a Hunter rig. We measure and adjust toe and camber to the millimetre — for calm straight-line running and even tyre wear.

items.title: Rims, complete wheels & tyres
items.description: Premium rims and branded tyres — chosen to your wishes, ordered for you and delivered as a ready complete wheel. Plus buy & sell of used wheels.

items.title: Wheel storage
items.description: Safe, clean storage of your seasonal wheels in our hotel — cleaned, checked and ready for your next appointment.

useCases.label: More service
useCases.title: So every detail is right.
useCases.subtitle: Complementary services we carry out at every visit with the same standard of care.

items.title: Balancing with Hunter & SmartWeight®
items.description: Balancing on our latest Hunter balancer with SmartWeight® technology — for the best ride comfort and smooth running at any speed.

items.title: Ultrasonic wheel wash
items.description: Thorough cleaning of wheels and rims in an ultrasonic bath — spotless before fitting, balancing and storage.

items.title: TPMS service
items.description: Tyre-pressure monitoring system: OEM sensors as well as programmable systems — programming, maintenance and replacement.

items.title: Runflat tyres & service
items.description: Professional service for runflat tyres — as a WDK-certified workshop in line with the applicable guidelines.

items.title: Tyre diagnostics
items.description: Vibration control as well as radial and lateral force measurement reveal problems you cannot see from the outside.

items.title: Made to order & used
items.description: We order new tyres and rims exactly to your wishes; used wheels we buy and sell fairly.

technik.label: Technology & equipment
technik.title: We work with Hunter — the reference in the workshop.
technik.subtitle: Precision is no accident. We rely on equipment from Hunter Engineering — the same technology trusted by manufacturers and professionals.

items.title: Hawkeye Elite® · 3D alignment
items.description: Camera-based 3D measurement in seconds, to the millimetre. We see immediately whether toe and camber are exactly right.

items.title: Road Force® · diagnostic balancing
items.description: More than balancing: Road Force® detects when the tyre or rim itself causes vibration — and solves problems normal balancing cannot find.
items.impact: Finds the cause, not just the symptom

items.title: SmartWeight® · efficient balancing
items.description: Optimised balancing with fewer weights — gentler on the rim and the environment, with the best smoothness.

technik.attribution: Hawkeye Elite®, Road Force® and SmartWeight® are trademarks of Hunter Engineering Company.

reifenlabel.label: Good to know
reifenlabel.title: The EU tyre label — simply explained.
reifenlabel.subtitle: Every new tyre carries an EU label with three values. We help you read them correctly — and choose the right tyre for how you drive.

items.title: Fuel efficiency
items.description: How much rolling resistance affects consumption and CO₂. A better class saves real money.

items.title: Wet grip
items.description: How short the braking distance is on a wet road. One letter can mean several metres.

items.title: External rolling noise
items.description: In decibels: how loud the tyre rolls. Quieter means noticeably more comfort.

reifenlabel.note: Just ask us — we will tell you honestly which values really matter for you.

reviews.label: Customer voices
reviews.title: Recommended over 360 times.
reviews.subtitle: Our customers give us top marks on Google — thank you for your trust.

quotes.name: Hanno Weisensee
quotes.text: Fachlich sehr kompetent, freundlich und kommunikativ. Mein Vibrationsproblem wurde zielgerichtet und nachhaltig behoben. Der beste Reifenservice, bei dem ich bisher war. Klare Empfehlung.

quotes.name: Olaf Heisterkamp
quotes.text: Schon immer ein super Reifenservice mit total netten und kompetenten Mitarbeitenden. Für mich 10 von 10.

founder.label: The workshop
founder.title: Your tyre specialist in Sehnde since 1987.
founder.body: Since 1987 and now in the second generation, we have been all about wheels. Good service, to us, means high customer satisfaction — that includes competent advice, professional workmanship and support even after the purchase. We are your service partner for everything around wheels.
founder.quote: Well advised means better bought — that is our motto.
founder.name: Wollny Reifenservice GmbH
founder.role: Family business, 2nd generation · Sehnde near Hannover

items.q: Do I need an appointment for a tyre change?
items.a: Yes, please arrange an appointment in advance — by phone on 05138 4520 or via the contact form. This avoids waiting times, especially during the seasonal peak. We are open Mon–Fri 07:00–15:30, closed on Saturdays — appointments outside opening hours by arrangement.

items.q: When does a wheel alignment make sense?
items.a: Whenever your vehicle pulls to one side, the tyres wear unevenly, after work on the chassis or after kerb contact. Our 3D wheel alignment shows to the millimetre whether toe and camber are correct.

items.q: Do you store my seasonal tyres?
items.a: Yes. In our tyre hotel we keep your summer or winter tyres safe and clean. For the next change they are checked and ready to go — you do not have to transport anything.

items.q: Can I get tyres and rims as a complete wheel?
items.a: Of course. We advise you on the right size, mount tyres on steel or alloy rims and hand over fully balanced complete wheels — for private and business customers.

items.q: Do you also look after company vehicles and fleets?
items.a: Yes, we are an experienced partner for business customers. Ask us about fleet conditions, predictable appointments and storage.
You will find us at Borsigring 38 in 31319 Sehnde, just a few minutes from Hannover. We are open Monday to Friday from 07:00 to 15:30, closed on Saturdays.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy explains how Wollny Reifenservice GmbH ("we") processes personal data in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR). This document is a template and should be reviewed by qualified legal counsel before publication.

sections.heading: 1. Controller
sections.body: Wollny Reifenservice GmbH is the controller for the personal data collected via this website. For data protection enquiries, please contact us using the details in the legal notice.

sections.heading: 2. What data we collect
sections.body: We process voluntarily provided contact data (such as name, email, phone number, vehicle details and message) as well as limited technical data (such as anonymised analytics and server logs) required for the operation and security of the website.

sections.heading: 3. Purpose and legal basis
sections.body: We process your data to respond to enquiries and arrange appointments (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR), to operate and improve the website (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR — legitimate interest) and on the basis of your consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).

sections.heading: 4. Retention period
sections.body: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary for the stated purposes or as required by law; thereafter it is securely deleted.

sections.heading: 5. Your rights
sections.body: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction and portability of your data, as well as a right to object. You may also lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

sections.heading: 6. Contact
sections.body: To exercise any of these rights, please contact Wollny Reifenservice GmbH using the contact details provided on this website.

impressum.title: Legal Notice
impressum.intro: Information pursuant to § 5 DDG (German Digital Services Act).
impressum.responsibleNote: Responsible for content pursuant to § 18 (2) MStV.
impressum.disclaimer: The contents of our pages were created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of the content. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages under general law.
